description:
Using ESA SNAP, apply a custom 3x3 spatial filter kernel named 'Custom_Orthogonal_Edge' to band_2 (NIR) of the Landsat multispectral image at /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif. The kernel must use these exact weights:
-1 -2 -1
-2 12 -2
-1 -2 -1
Save the resulting product as a BEAM-DIMAP file to /home/ga/snap_exports/custom_filtered.dim and export it as a GeoTIFF to /home/ga/snap_exports/custom_filtered.tif.
